name: XO Telegram Bot
description: A production-ready Tic-Tac-Toe Telegram bot with PvP, AI, Tournaments, Coins, ELO and multi-language support.

BOT_USERNAME.description: Your bot's username WITHOUT the @ symbol (e.g. MyXOBot)

UPDATE_CHANNEL.description: Your Telegram update channel username WITH @ (e.g. @MyBotUpdates)

SUPPORT_USERNAME.description: Your Telegram support username WITHOUT @ (e.g. MySupport)

OWNER_ID.description: Your personal Telegram user ID (get it from @userinfobot)

BOT_THINK_DELAY.description: Seconds the bot 'thinks' before making a move (default: 1.2)

WEBHOOK_URL.description: Auto-set after deploy. Format: https://YOUR-APP-NAME.herokuapp.com — leave blank first, then set after deploy.

PORT.description: Port for webhook server (Heroku sets this automatically)
